channel.title: GitHub trends
channel.description: Automatically compiled list of trending GitHub repositories

item.title: anomalyco/opencode
item.description: The open source coding agent.

item.title: rohanprasadofficial/localflare
item.description: local cloudflare

item.title: alexknowshtml/smaug
item.description: Archive your Twitter/X bookmarks to markdown. Automatically. Like a dragon hoarding treasure, Smaug collects the valuable things you bookmark.

item.title: lklynet/hypermind
item.description: The High-Availability Solution to a Problem That Doesn't Exist.

item.title: MorpheApp/morphe-manager
item.description: Morphe Manager

item.title: HQarroum/docker-android
item.description: 🤖 A minimal and customizable Docker image running the Android emulator as a service.

item.title: guillevc/yubal
item.description: YouTube Music album downloader with Spotify metadata auto-tagging

item.title: steveyegge/gastown
item.description: Gas Town - multi-agent workspace manager

item.title: zapdos-labs/unblink
item.description: Modern video analytics with VLM

item.title: shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code
item.description: How can we build a true AI agent? Like Claude Code.

item.title: dabit3/openform
item.description: Open Source TypeForm Clone

item.title: CloudAI-X/claude-workflow
item.description: Universal Claude Code workflow plugin with agents, skills, hooks, and commands

item.title: IQuestLab/IQuest-Coder-V1
item.description: (no description)

item.title: ThePrimeagen/99
item.description: Neovim AI agent done right

item.title: Lulzx/zpdf
item.description: Zero-copy PDF text extraction library written in Zig. High-performance, memory-mapped parsing with SIMD acceleration.

item.title: heilcheng/awesome-agent-skills
item.description: A curated list of skills, tools, tutorials, and capabilities for AI coding agents (Claude, Codex, Copilot, VS Code)

item.title: Dimillian/Skills
item.description: My Codex Skills

item.title: cocos/cocos4
item.description: COCOS 4

item.title: Aryan4266/k8squest
item.description: K8sQuest — A local, hands-on Kubernetes learning game with real-world troubleshooting challenges. Practice Pods, Deployments, Services, networking, storage, and debugging using kubectl on a local cluster (kind/k3d). No cloud required.

item.title: Tencent-Hunyuan/HY-Motion-1.0
item.description: (no description)

item.title: breaking-brake/cc-wf-studio
item.description: ClaudeCode Workflow Studio

item.title: drpaneas/libgodc
item.description: Go runtime for Dreamcast using gccgo and KOS

item.title: buyukakyuz/corroded
item.description: Illegal rust

item.title: Crementif/BotW-BetterVR
item.description: A project aimed at providing a better PC VR mode for BotW using the Cemu emulator

item.title: muratcankoylan/Agent-Skills-for-Context-Engineering
item.description: A comprehensive collection of Agent Skills for context engineering, multi-agent architectures, and production agent systems. Use when building, optimizing, or debugging agent systems that require effective context management.

item.title: HKUDS/DeepTutor
item.description: "DeepTutor: AI-Powered Personalized Learning Assistant"

item.title: HarryR/z80ai
item.description: Z80-μLM is a 2-bit quantized language model small enough to run on an 8-bit Z80 processor. Train conversational models in Python, export them as CP/M .COM binaries, and chat with your vintage computer.

item.title: Tongyi-MAI/MAI-UI
item.description: (no description)

item.title: AnmolSaini16/mapcn
item.description: Beautiful map components. 100% Free, Zero config, one command setup.

item.title: kavehtehrani/cloudflare-speed-cli
item.description: CLI for internet speed test via cloudflare

item.title: ridafkih/keeper.sh
item.description: A monorepository for (time)keeper—a calendar synchronization and booking tool.

item.title: lout33/claude_life_assistant
item.description: A personal coach that remembers, notices patterns, and holds you accountable.

item.title: joe-desimone/mongobleed
item.description: (no description)

item.title: tobi/AudioPriorityBar
item.description: A native macOS menu bar app for managing audio device priorities

item.title: nguyenphutrong/quotio
item.description: Stop juggling AI accounts. Quotio is a beautiful native macOS menu bar app that unifies your Claude, Gemini, OpenAI, Qwen, and Antigravity subscriptions – with real-time quota tracking and smart auto-failover for AI coding tools like Claude Code, OpenCode, and Droid.

item.title: goforj/str
item.description: A fluent, Laravel-inspired string toolkit for Go with explicit, rune-safe helpers and predictable behavior.

item.title: jvdillon/netv
item.description: neTV - IPTV for your Browser

item.title: davidfowl/tally
item.description: LLM-powered spending categorization. Let AI classify your bank transactions.

item.title: DocJade/fluster_rs
item.description: A futuristic filesystem that's stuck in the past.

item.title: technomancer702/nodecast-tv
item.description: A self-hosted web application that lets you stream Live TV, Movies, and Series from your Xtream Codes or M3U provider directly in your browser. It's built with performance in mind and handles large libraries smoothly.

item.title: supermemoryai/opencode-supermemory
item.description: Supermemory plugin for OpenCode

item.title: kubeden/clopus-watcher
item.description: An autonomous 24/7 on-call engineer in the form of a Claude Code living in a cronjob.

item.title: RackulaLives/Rackula
item.description: (no description)

item.title: parcadei/Continuous-Claude-v2
item.description: Context management for Claude Code. Hooks maintain state via ledgers and handoffs. MCP execution without context pollution. Agent orchestration with isolated context windows.

item.title: 0xSojalSec/PentestAgent
item.description: All-in-one offensive security toolbox with AI agent and MCP architecture. Integrates tools like Nmap, Metasploit, FFUF, SQLMap. Enables pentesting, bug bounty hunting, threat hunting, and reporting. RAG-based responses with local knowledge base support.

item.title: simonw/claude-code-transcripts
item.description: Tools for publishing transcripts for Claude Code sessions

item.title: DeepMyst/Mysti
item.description: AI coding dream team of agents for VS Code. Claude Code + openai Codex collaborate in brainstorm mode, debate solutions, and synthesize the best approach for your code.

item.title: safety-research/bloom
item.description: bloom - evaluate any behavior immediately 🌸🌱
